name: SCP-002
description: SCP-002 resembles a tumorous, fleshy growth with a hollow interior containing furniture.
containment: SCP-002 must remain connected to a suitable power supply at all times to prevent structural collapse.

name: SCP-003
description: SCP-003 consists of two related components, one organic and one electronic.
containment: SCP-003 must be kept at a constant temperature and monitored continuously to prevent instability.

name: SCP-004
description: SCP-004 is a set of antique keys and a wooden door that leads to dangerous alternate spaces.
containment: The door must remain locked, and access is restricted to authorized personnel only.

name: SCP-005
description: SCP-005 is a key capable of opening any lock, regardless of design.
containment: SCP-005 must be stored securely and only used for approved testing procedures.

name: SCP-006
description: SCP-006 is a small spring of water that has regenerative and life-extending properties.
containment: The area must be guarded at all times, and access is limited to authorized researchers.
